== Notes for [[Item:Q2369|Q2369]] ==

{geni:about_me} HIS ORIGINAL NAME WAS SATYAVRATA, BUT COMMITTED THREE (TRI) SIN, AND HENCE GOT THE NAME TRISHANKU. FIRST WHILE HE WAS A PRINCE, HE MISBEHAVED AND WAS TEMPORARILY EXILED FROM KINGDOM. NEXT HE KILLED THE MILCH COW OF HIS PRECEPTOR VASISHTA. HIS THIRD SIN WAS THAT HE USED THE UN SANCTIFIED MEAT OF HIS KILL AS FOOD. TRISHANKU ALSO HAD A DESIRE TO ASCEND TO HEAVEN IN HIS MORTAL BODY. AFTER VASISHTA REFUSED HIM THIS BOON, SINCE IT IS AGAINST NATURE TO ASCEND INTO HEAVEN AS A MORTAL, THE SAGE VISWAMITRA, VASISHTA'S RIVAL, CREATED ANTHER HEAVEN FOR HIM, CALLED "TRISHANKU'S HEAVEN", AND LOCATED IN MID-AIR. HIS SON WAS HARISHCHANDRA WHO IS KNOWN FOR HIS HONESTY, TRUTH AND DEVOTION TO DUTY OR DHARMA.


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
